Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Continued To Mar-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Oliver Frank.

The Court stated that there is an issue regarding status of the dissolution at the time Ms. Frank died, and provided Ms. Alavi with the following options: 1) deny the petition because the Husband is entitled to serve and has not declined or nominated the Petitioner, or 2) grant the petition with full bond and set a status date for filing of a petition to determine heirship. Ms. Alavi chose option number 2, stated that this is a unique situation, referred to Probate Code 78(d) and stated that she has a judgment that terminates the marital status and states that there was no community property. Ms. Alavi is to determine the appropriate amount of the bond and provide a supplement in support of the bond amount. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with bond amount to be determined (subject to receipt of a revised order reflecting the correct amount of bond and review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for May 25, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition to determine entitlement is set for February 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Continued To Nov-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
